# Mikhail Shytsko

> Solutions & AI Engineer at Slovenská sporiteľňa (Slovakia's largest retail bank, 2M+ customers). Founder of Seedfast, a schema-aware synthetic-data generator for PostgreSQL targeting compliance-sensitive industries where production data cannot be copied into development environments.

## About

- [Portfolio](https://mikhail.shytsko.com): Single-page CV with summary, experience, education, projects, and contact form.
- [Resume PDF](https://mikhail.shytsko.com/cv.pdf): Downloadable resume.

## Projects

- [Seedfast](https://seedfa.st): AI-native synthetic data generator. Reads PostgreSQL schemas and produces referentially-consistent fake data in under 3 minutes with zero configuration. Built for regulated industries (finance, pharma, medtech) where production data cannot leave secure environments. 1st place at DDAccelerator Finals (9 countries).
- [DDAccelerator article on Seedfast](https://www.ddaccelerator.com/news/seedfast-makes-database-seeding-fast-clean-and-reliable-straight-from-the-cli)

- [DZone](https://dzone.com/users/5530357)
- [Linktree](https://linktr.ee/mikhsh)

## Expertise

- Backend architecture: Spring Framework, Python, high-load microservices
- AI / LLM engineering: LLM-powered developer tooling, AI-native systems
- Databases: PostgreSQL, schema-aware data generation
- Domain: Banking and regulated-industry software
